description_long: This is a minimalist open-frame shelving unit featuring a rectangular structure with a black metal frame and a single wooden shelf at the base. The frame is composed of four vertical metal posts connected by horizontal bars at the top and bottom, creating a sturdy, geometric outline. The shelf itself is made of a wood panel with a natural finish, providing a warm contrast to the industrial black metal. The open design allows for visibility and accessibility from all sides, making it suitable for displaying or storing items in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or garages. There are no doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its function as a display or storage shelf. The overall aesthetic is modern and functional, blending seamlessly into contemporary urban settings.
description: A modern open-frame shelving unit with a black metal structure and a single wooden base shelf, designed for display or storage in urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular frame and the wooden shelf at the bottom, with the open structure clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelf and the vertical metal posts, with the wooden base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the open frame and wooden shelf, with no back panel or enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and open vertical structure, with the wooden base clearly visible.
